articles.title: Should you take Social Security at 62? Consider these 4 factors - USA Today
articles.description: Americans are most likely to claim Social Security benefits at 62. But is it the "best" age? We examine 4 big reasons for claiming early.
articles.content:
Sixty-two is the earliest age most Americans can claim Social Security. It's also the most popular age for claiming the retirement benefit.
But is 62 the best age to claim Social Security?
